_comment: Renggo orchestrator tool spec for the Band Bridge. Add these to your agent's tool list in the orchestrator config.

tools.name: escalate_to_band
tools.description: Escalate the current call to a Band room of specialist agents (triage, knowledge, compliance, and optional human supervisor). Use when the issue is complex, involves a refund exception, compliance concern, or hardship case. Returns an escalation_id to poll with check_resolution.

caller_id.description: Caller phone number or customer ID

issue_description.description: Concise description of the issue to escalate

transcript.description: Last 5-10 turns of the call transcript

context.description: Additional structured context (account info, previous tickets, etc.)

tools.name: check_resolution
tools.description: Poll for the resolution of an active Band escalation. Call this after escalate_to_band. If status is 'resolved', read resolution.resolution_text and speak it to the caller. If status is 'callback_scheduled', tell the caller they will receive a callback shortly and end the call gracefully. Poll every 3-5 seconds, up to 20 seconds.
